hero.subheadline: Your neighbors know us — 5-star rated electricians who show up on time and get it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled
services_section.subheading: From GFCI upgrades to complete rewiring, we fix what's broken and upgrade what needs it

services.title: GFCI Outlet Installation
services.description: New GFCI outlets for bathrooms, kitchens, and outdoor areas. Code-compliant work that passes inspection every time.

services.title: Circuit Breaker Replacement
services.description: Old breakers tripping constantly? We replace them right the first time with quality components that last.

services.title: Flickering Light Diagnosis
services.description: Find the real cause of flickering lights and fix it same day. No more living with electrical mysteries.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Upgrade outdated panels to handle modern electrical demands. Safe, reliable power for your whole home.

about.heading: Columbus electricians who do it right
about.body: We're the electrical team Columbus homeowners call when they need it done correctly. Every job passes inspection because we follow safety procedures and use quality materials. Our work speaks for itself — just check our reviews.

reviews.name: Brandy W.
reviews.text: New GFCI outlets in bathrooms and kitchen were installed perfectly. Work was exact and done quickly by trustworthy professionals.

reviews.name: Christina T.
reviews.text: They diagnosed our flickering lights and fixed the problem the same day. Excellent service from start to finish.

reviews.name: A G.
reviews.text: Circuit breaker replacement done right the first time. Friendly team that explained all safety procedures clearly.

reviews.name: Joan R.
reviews.text: Well-organized crew that arrived on time and worked carefully. Very happy with the quality of their work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Same-day electrical service throughout central Ohio

cta.heading: Ready to fix that electrical problem?
cta.body: Get a free quote today. Same-day service available for urgent repairs.
